characters.appearance: Green cartoon owl. Large white eyes with black pupils. Orange beak and feet.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, transitions from angry to joyful.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable feeling of frustration (often associated with struggling to speak English).
- Uses a fast zoom to build sudden dramatic tension.

- Resolves the tension by showing a happy, surprised expression.
- Introduces the core value proposition of quick, daily practice.
- Provides a clear, actionable button click visual.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ 10 मिनट में English बोलना सीखें [Learn to speak English in 10 minutes daily]
START PRACTICING

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the brand logo and core tagline clearly.
- Shows app store badges to build trust and direct the user on where to download.
- Delivers the final Call to Action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Confidence के साथ English बोलें [Speak English with confidence]
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
DOWNLOAD NOW

brand_swaps_detected.supernova_swap: Confidence के साथ English बोलें [Speak English with confidence]
